# CEVONS Environmental Services Inc.

> Guyana's market leader in waste management and environmental services since 1997. Reliable residential, commercial, industrial, recycling, and facility services across Georgetown, Linden, and Berbice.

CEVONS Environmental Services Inc. is a Guyanese company providing complete waste management, sanitation, and environmental services to homes, businesses, industries, and government facilities. Operating since 1997, CEVONS is EPA certified, ISO 9001:2015 quality managed, and a member of the Guyana Chamber of Commerce and Industry (GCCI) and the Private Sector Commission (PSC).

## Contact

- Phone (Head Office): +592 218 1455
- WhatsApp: +592 625 5211
- Email: info@cevons.com
- Hours: Monday – Saturday, 8:00am to 5:00pm

## Locations

- [Georgetown — Head Office](/locations): Lot 1 Mandela Avenue, Georgetown, Guyana — +592 218 1455
- [Linden — Branch Office](/locations): 17 Republic Avenue, McKensie, Linden, Guyana — +592 444 6248
- [Berbice — Branch Office](/locations): Lot 16 New Street, New Amsterdam, Guyana — +592 333 1455

## Services — Residential

- [General Trash Collection](/services/general-trash-collection): Scheduled household waste pickup.
- [Dumpster Rental](/services/dumpster-rental): Short and long-term dumpsters for home projects.
- [Septic Services](/services/septic-services): Septic tank pumping and clearance for homes.
- [Portable Toilet](/services/portable-toilet): Clean portable toilet rentals for events and projects.

## Services — Commercial

- [General Waste Management](/services/general-waste-management): Scheduled collection for businesses and properties.
- [Skip Bin & Dumpster Rental](/services/skip-bin-dumpster-rental): Multiple sizes for construction and ongoing site use.
- [Grease Trap / Septic Tank](/services/grease-trap-septic-tank): Grease trap and septic servicing for restaurants and facilities.
- [Document Shredding](/services/document-shredding): Secure document destruction with chain-of-custody.

## Services — Industrial

- [Hazardous Waste](/services/hazardous-waste): Regulated handling, transport, and disposal.
- [Wastewater](/services/wastewater): Industrial wastewater collection and treatment.
- [Used Waste Oil](/services/used-waste-oil): Compliant collection and recycling of used oil.
- [Contaminated Soil](/services/contaminated-soil): Excavation, transport, and treatment of contaminated material.
- [Tank Cleaning](/services/tank-cleaning): Industrial tank cleaning with safety controls.
- [Product Destruction](/services/product-destruction): Certified destruction with auditable documentation.
- [Biohazardous Disposal](/services/biohazardous-disposal): Safe biohazardous waste collection and disposal.

## Services — Recycling & Facilities

- [Material Recovery Facility](/services/material-recovery-facility): Sorting and recovery turning waste into resources.
- [Landfill Operations](/services/landfill-operations): Managed landfill with environmental safeguards.

## Key Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of CEVONS services and impact.
- [All Services](/services): Full service catalog by category.
- [Industries Served](/industries): Sectors we support.
- [Locations](/locations): Branches and service areas in Guyana.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, and office addresses.
- [Request a Service](/request-service): Online service request form.
- [About](/about): Company history, mission, and certifications.
- [Resources](/resources): Insights on waste management and compliance.

## Optional

- [Track Request](/track-request): Look up the status of an existing service request.
